category_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage as a Unix-style diff highlighter reading stdin.
source_facts.description says it is an LCS-based diff highlighting tool for terminal code review.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and repository name use diffr.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface found for installation, usage, git integration, and color customization.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mookid/diffr, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents git integration and color customization for diff output.
source_facts.description mentions terminal code review and diff highlighting.
